title: Low Power Mode for solar RPT

messages.author: Matiko
messages.text: Adding a power-saving feature that kicks in automatically when a solar repeater's battery drops below ~30% could be a great way to boost network reliability. This mode could, for example, reduce the advertising frequency, limit forwarded frames to essential messages only, and disable other non-critical functions that don't affect core network usage. Owner should be allowed to set low_power_mode_entry% (say 30% by default), can choose wchich funcion (from fixed list) want to disable in this mode.
messages.content_html: Adding a power-saving feature that kicks in automatically when a solar repeater's battery drops below ~30% could be a great way to boost network reliability. This mode could, for example, reduce the advertising frequency, limit forwarded frames to essential messages only, and disable other non-critical functions that don't affect core network usage. Owner should be allowed to set low_power_mode_entry% (say 30% by default), can choose wchich funcion (from fixed list) want to disable in this mode.
messages.reactions_html: 1
